summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SEO Content sections (ToolContent component) across all 20 tool pages. All features working correctly - tab navigation, content display, and Related Tools links.
passed_tests: SEO Content sections visible on all 20 tool pages
Tab navigation works correctly (How to Use, Features & Benefits, FAQ, Tips & Tricks)
Tab content displays properly when clicked
Related Tools section visible on all tool pages
Related Tools links navigate correctly to target pages
Content is readable with proper formatting (headings, lists, paragraphs)
FAQ sections contain properly formatted questions and answers
Design consistency maintained - dark glassmorphism style with neon accents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 tool pages now have SEO content sections with ToolContent component integrated. Each page has 4 tabs (How to Use, Features & Benefits, FAQ, Tips & Tricks) and Related Tools links. The content is rich and properly formatted for AdSense compliance. Tab navigation uses data-testid attributes: tab-how-to, tab-features, tab-faq, tab-tips. Content sections use: content-how-to, content-features, content-faq, content-tips.
